prompt: The outdoor observation deck of a tall coastal lighthouse with a metal safety railing, rocky coastline below with white waves crashing against dark rocks, vast deep blue ocean stretching to the horizon, seabirds in the distance, and a bright sunny sky with scattered clouds. Turning right, the coastline curves into a sandy cove with a small fishing village, colorful boats pulled up on the beach, and green hills rising behind the houses. Further around, the mainland coast features wooded cliffs, a long pier, and a distant harbor with larger vessels. Behind, the lighthouse tower itself rises with its red-and-white striped paint and the glass lantern room at the top. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level from the lighthouse observation deck, looking out over the ocean with the metal railing in the foreground.

scene_adherence.visible_part: The outdoor observation deck is fitted with a metal safety railing. A rocky coastline lies below, with white waves crashing against dark rocks. A vast deep blue ocean stretches to the horizon. Seabirds are visible in the distance above the water. A bright sunny sky with scattered clouds is overhead.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: This observation deck belongs to a tall coastal lighthouse. Turning right, the coastline curves into a sandy cove with a small fishing village, colorful boats pulled up on the beach, and green hills rising behind the houses. Further around, the mainland coast features wooded cliffs, a long pier, and a distant harbor with larger vessels. Behind the observation deck, the lighthouse tower itself rises with its red-and-white striped paint and the glass lantern room at the top.
